summary: Created BUILD_BLUEPRINT.md (1,432 lines, 24 sections, ~58 KB) with complete implementation blueprint covering 20 main sections plus 3 appendices: project scaffold, directory map, package inventory, type system, state architecture, navigation, screen specs with ASCII diagrams, component catalogue with prop interfaces, animation state machine, gesture pipeline, randomisation engine, sound/haptics map, storage layer, export pipeline, asset manifest, 5-phase build order with 38 tasks, per-file implementation notes, testing strategy, performance budget, and risk register.
